record.text: 💼 Taiwan's $6.6 billion bet on drone production reveals a stark reality: in asymmetric warfare, scalable, low-cost tech can be a stronger defense moat than traditional arms.

arXiv: arxiv.org/abs/2512.16636
code: github.com/giorgospets/reglue

🙏 Huge thanks to the co-authors @giorgospets.bsky.social, Christos Sgouropoulos, Theodoros Giannakopoulos, Giorgos Sfikas, and @ikakogeorgiou.bsky.social 🎊

#ECCV26 #ComputerVision #AI #GenerativeAI #ImageGeneration #PaperAccepted

🔍 Local semantics do the heavy lifting; global [CLS] and alignment stay orthogonal, complementary signals. 
 
🔥 ~30% faster convergence — SiT-XL/2 matches 1M-step SOTA in 700k iterations.

💡 The takeaway: it's not just whether you use VFM semantics, but how you leverage them.

Highlights 🏁

 🧩 Joint modeling of VAE latents ➕ compressed multi-layer patch features ➕ global [CLS], with alignment loss as a complementary boost.

 💎 A lightweight non-linear semantic compressor that preserves patch-level structure where linear PCA falls short (21.4 → 13.3 FID). 📉

The race for scientific talent is now as competitive as the race for compute.

Where do you think the next chapter of AI is being written?

#Anthropic #DeepMind #AITalent #GenerativeAI #AIPulse

John Jumper spent nearly 9 years at Google, won a Nobel Prize, then picked Anthropic.

Co-creator of AlphaFold and 2024 Nobel laureate in Chemistry  is not the only one shifting sides
In this new era, your real edge is how well you understand the people you’re building for.

Prompt in Alt 👇
By @a5roseb.bsky.social 

✨ Open to All ✨

#AlArtwork #ConceptArt #HorrorArt #Atmospheric #ArtistOnBluesky #AlArt #AI #SynthArt #AIArtist #Genai  #AiCommunity #GenerativeArt #DarkArt #WatercolorIllustration #Surrealism #ConceptArt #Monochromatic #AtmosphericArt

images.alt: A monochromatic watercolor illustration depicts a tiny fisherman in a weathered wooden boat floating on still water near the bottom of the composition. The elderly figure wears a brimmed hat and grips a harpoon or gaff, standing alert but seemingly unaware of the immense danger behind him. Dominating nearly the entire image is the ghostly form of a colossal shark emerging from loose washes of blue-gray pigment. Its enormous mouth gapes open, filled with rows of jagged triangular teeth that form a dark cavern at the center of the artwork. One black eye stares outward from the swirling watercolor textures, while splatters, drips, and soft brushwork dissolve parts of the creature into mist-like abstraction. The shark appears less like a physical animal and more like an overwhelming force materializing from the sea itself. The contrast between the tiny boat and the massive predator creates a powerful sense of vulnerability and impending doom. Large areas of pale paper remain visible around the figures, emphasizing isolation, scale, and the suspense of an unseen threat lurking just beneath the surface.

The elderly figure wears a brimmed hat and grips a harpoon or gaff, standing alert but seemingly unaware of the immense danger behind him. Dominating nearly the entire image is the ghostly form of a colossal shark emerging from loose washes of blue-gray pigment. Its enormous mouth gapes open, filled with rows of jagged triangular teeth that form a dark cavern at the center of the artwork. One black eye stares outward from the swirling watercolor textures, while splatters, drips, and soft brushwork dissolve parts of the creature into mist-like abstraction. The shark appears less like a physical animal and more like an overwhelming force materializing from the sea itself. The contrast between the tiny boat and the massive predator creates a powerful sense of vulnerability and impending doom. Large areas of pale paper remain visible around the figures, emphasizing isolation, scale, and the suspense of an unseen threat lurking just beneath the surface.

images.alt: A nun standing ankle-deep in a flooded cathedral at midnight, holding a lantern filled with black butterflies instead of light. Her habit is pristine, but the reflection beneath her shows something ancient wearing the same face. Stained-glass saints loom above her, cracked and glowing faintly, while pale lilies drift across the water like tiny funerals. Sacred, surreal, gothic, eerie but graceful, cinematic lighting, high-detail fabric, quiet dread, beautiful composition, dreamlike religious symbolism.

images.alt: A strange, cinematic portrait of a nun in an impossible convent where the sacred and surreal quietly blur together. She stands in a moonlit stone hallway lined with flickering votive candles, but each candle flame contains a tiny floating eye. Her habit is traditional black and white, yet subtly ornate, with embroidered constellations and small silver keys sewn into the veil. Around her, the walls are covered in old devotional paintings whose figures have turned to look directly at her. Calm, eerie, reverent, slightly unsettling, gothic atmosphere, soft film grain, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, elegant composition, weird but beautiful, not horror-gory.

She stands in a moonlit stone hallway lined with flickering votive candles, but each candle flame contains a tiny floating eye. Her habit is traditional black and white, yet subtly ornate, with embroidered constellations and small silver keys sewn into the veil. Around her, the walls are covered in old devotional paintings whose figures have turned to look directly at her. Calm, eerie, reverent, slightly unsettling, gothic atmosphere, soft film grain, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, elegant composition, weird but beautiful, not horror-gory.

images.alt: ull-body, head-to-toe high-glam cyberpunk editorial portrait of a solemn futuristic ceremonial figure, nun-adjacent but not actual clergy, standing or seated in a strong centered pose against a saturated crimson studio backdrop. Calm direct gaze, composed shoulders, controlled posture, devotional stillness, iconic fashion-poster presence. Styling evokes a cyberpunk convent motif through a sharp structured collar, dark narrow tie, sleek uniform silhouette, ceremonial symmetry, austere elegance, and restrained black-chrome layering, without using an actual habit, veil, cross, rosary, or religious garment. Reflective chrome long-sleeve button-up shirt with sharp collar, dark fitted tie, high-waisted fitted bottoms, wide belt with polished metal buckle, metallic gloves, rounded armored knee elements, glossy black accents, sculptural shoulder details, subtle tactical straps, polished hardware. Structured voluminous hair with blunt bangs and sculpted curled lengths, glossy editorial makeup, luminous facial highlights, glossy lips, calm focused intensity. Diagonal sword-like prop or ceremonial blade silhouette behind the subject, glowing petal-like fragments floating through the scene like synthetic blossoms or digital stained glass. Dramatic studio lighting with intense specular highlights, cool blue-white reflections across chrome fabric, deep black shadows, saturated red-pink background glow, sleek reflective textures, high contrast, clean anime linework, cyberpunk fashion illustration, futuristic uniform styling, cinematic poster composition, vibrant color grading, sharp detail, subtle bloom, polished glossy finish, editorial drama.

If it underplays it, nothing happens.

wonder --v 8.1 --ar 5:4

which ideas repeat & which compositions survive

力が持つ「精神力」と「忍耐」を象徴するような存在です。

After a family argument I realize xenogenders are toxic. I can express my love for bunnies through art instead. I'm just an enby girl celebrating pride.

#aiart #synthart #Pride

Sorry for going off track with self discovery stuff. I realize now how much stuff like stargender was silly. Giving pride real nonbinary identities. I'm an enby girl. Or demigirl. Who just thinks to much.   

#aiart #synthart #Pride #PrideMonth

Another nonbinary woman for pride. Paridot from Steven Universe. I think she is also ace coded.

#aiart #synthart #Pride #SU
